nodes.name: Daily Schedule (prod)
nodes.notes: Runs daily at 08:00 server time. Adjust schedule and timezone in n8n for each client.

nodes.name: Set Example Source Inputs
nodes.notes: Static demo source payloads. Replace with analytics, billing, CRM and support connectors in production.

nodes.name: Validate Inputs / Control Config
nodes.notes: Validates thresholds and parses source payloads. Adds retry metadata, scoring version and data-minimisation guidance.

nodes.name: Collect Usage Signals
nodes.notes: Demo usage source branch. Replace with product analytics or warehouse query nodes with retry and timeout settings.

nodes.name: Collect Billing Signals
nodes.notes: Demo billing source branch. Replace with Stripe, Chargebee, Xero, QuickBooks or finance database nodes.

nodes.name: Collect CRM Signals
nodes.notes: Demo CRM source branch. Replace with Salesforce, HubSpot or internal customer table nodes.

nodes.name: Collect Support Signals
nodes.notes: Demo support source branch. Replace with Zendesk, Intercom, Freshdesk, CSAT/NPS or helpdesk nodes.

nodes.name: Aggregate Account Signals
nodes.notes: Combines available source records by account. Missing or failed sources remain visible in source_statuses and source_warnings.

nodes.name: Prepare Source Failure Alerts
nodes.notes: Prepares operations alert payloads for failed, empty or partial source branches. Replace or extend with Slack, email or incident tooling.

nodes.name: Score Churn Risk
nodes.notes: Applies transparent churn-risk rules. This remains the decision authority even when optional LLM wording is added later.

nodes.name: Prepare Optional LLM Outreach Drafts
nodes.notes: Prepares minimal account-level LLM prompts and demo outreach wording. Replace with a local/private LLM node only after data-handling rules are agreed.

nodes.name: Filter / Rank Watchlist
nodes.notes: Filters above threshold, sorts deterministically and limits to top N accounts.

nodes.name: Build Watchlist Summary
nodes.notes: Builds the customer-success watchlist with source status, missing-source warnings, reasons and outreach suggestions.

nodes.name: Prepare Outreach Tasks (placeholder)
nodes.notes: Prepares CRM task payloads with idempotency keys. Replace with Salesforce, HubSpot, Gainsight, Catalyst or task-management nodes.

nodes.name: Prepare CS Notification (placeholder)
nodes.notes: Prepares Slack/email/Teams notification payload with an idempotency key. Replace with the client notification channel.

nodes.name: Log Audit Snapshot (demo)
nodes.notes: Creates an audit-ready output record. Replace or extend with database, warehouse, Google Sheets, Drive, Notion or object storage.
